use_cases: Animated hero background for landing pages
Decorative visual element for creative portfolios
Ambient animated backdrop for web applications
Visual accent for SaaS product pages
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered abstract shader component that renders animated glass-like visual effects using GLSL fragment shaders. Features two smoothly blended circles that orbit based on time uniforms, creating a cosmic color-shifting glow effect. The component includes a custom Renderer class that handles WebGL2 context setup, shader compilation, and animation loop. Ideal for creating impressive animated backgrounds on landing pages and creative applications.
